description.description: Some descriptive text to give information about this Routine

color.description: Color of the screen this Routine (e.g. black, $[1.0,1.0,1.0], $variable)

backgroundImg.description: Image file to use as a background (leave blank for no image)

varLists.description: List of variables for this routine

components.description: Components to include in the routine

allowedKeys.description: A list of allowed keys for keyboard input

forcedEndRoutine.description: Should a response force the end of the Routine (e.g end the trial)?
